rationale.R1.1: The draft carries explicit thesis, gap, and contribution claims ('first distributed serving system', 'new design axis'). Improving the draft centrally includes sharpening how those claims are framed and whether the stated gap is precisely scoped.
rationale.R1.2: Three interdependent quantitative results (38% clarification-round reduction, 19% p95 latency, 22% GPU-hours) plus a causal attribution ('entirely to the routing decision') form a chain that must be internally consistent; draft improvement requires verifying that chain holds.
